summary: V10010.0 Director's Cut + V10011.0 Omega Architect testing complete. All 18 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend displays V10011.0 OMEGA ARCHITECT header with Deep Dive and Timeline buttons. Deep Dive Search shows Perplexity-style multi-epoch synthesis with GPS-anchored source citations. Director Timeline shows 4 tracks (Law/Art/Logic/Wellness), render meter ($15/hr), and 54-layer movie rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: V10010.0 Director Status endpoint correctly returns 4 timeline tracks (LAW_ARCHIVE, ART_HOLOGRAPHY, LOGIC_MATH, WELLNESS_PULSE) and temporal index (PAST/PRESENT/FUTURE)
Timeline Scrub endpoint correctly maps position 0.1->PAST, 0.5->PRESENT, 0.9->FUTURE with layer calculation
Keyframe system successfully adds and retrieves keyframes with position, action_type, and timestamps
Render Meter tracks $15/hr usage with start/stop/status endpoints
Movie Render produces 54-layer Sovereign Movie with wealth calculation ($79,313.18 base, φ-multiplied)
V10011.0 Omega Status returns interface config (hud, timeline, mixer, render_meter) and phygital config (GPS anchors)
Final Print executes all 10 moves and returns 'IT IS FINISHED.' status with sealed state
Deep Dive Search synthesizes multi-epoch answers with GPS-anchored source citations
Frontend header shows 'V10011.0 • Omega Architect • Director Mode'
Deep Dive button opens Perplexity-style search with quick suggestions and epoch threading
Timeline button opens Director's Cut with 4 draggable tracks and render meter
context_for_next_testing_agent: V10010.0 Director's Cut and V10011.0 Omega Architect fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/omnis/director/status, POST /api/omnis/director/timeline/scrub?position={0-1}, POST /api/omnis/director/keyframe/add, GET /api/omnis/director/keyframes, POST /api/omnis/director/render-meter/start|stop, GET /api/omnis/director/render-meter/status, POST /api/omnis/director/movie/render, GET /api/omnis/omega/status, POST /api/omnis/omega/move/{1-10}, POST /api/omnis/omega/final-print, POST /api/omnis/search/deep-dive?query={query}. Frontend Sovereign Hub shows V10011.0 header with Deep Dive and Timeline buttons.
